author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو القاسم سليمان بن أحمد الطبراني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and compiler, known for his extensive collections of hadith.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: One of the major hadith collections by al-Tabarani, part of his trilogy (al-Mu'jam al-Kabir, al-Mu'jam al-Awsat, al-Mu'jam al-Saghir).
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of al-Tabarani's significant contributions to hadith literature, widely referenced in hadith studies.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Mahmoud Muhammad Muhammad Amara al-Sa'dani is recognized for his scholarly contributions, particularly in hadith studies and tahqiq.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The tahqiq includes a study and critical analysis of the hadith, with notes on the uniqueness of the narrations.
